§6Antischrabidium§f

§aThe antimatter equivalent of schrabidium — now with 50% more schrabidium!§f

§bAntischrabidium§f is the gaseous antimatter equivalent of schrabidium, held in cells and capsules. Like antimatter, bulk storage requires §bMagnetic Antimatter Containment Barrels§f.

§6Production§f (§bParticle Accelerator§f — §e400 score§f):
§b• Antimatter Capsule§f ×2 → §eAntischrabidium Capsule§f (empty capsule returned)

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Dark Matter Capsule§f — Antischrabidium Capsule ×2 (§e10,000 score§f) → Dark Matter
§b• Vibrant Singularity§f — for AMS/DFC core; Euphemium Compound + Antischrabidium Cells + Singularity
§b• Singularity§f — Euphemium Nuggets + Antischrabidium Cell + Block of Schrabidium
§b• CMB-Schrabidate Laser Crystal§f — Ferric Schrabidate + Antischrabidium Cell + CMB Steel + Quartz Glass
§b• Tossable Antischrabidium Cell§f — throwable weapon
§b• Schrabidium Missile§f — Small Missile Assembly + Antischrabidium Cell
§b• Cyclotron§f — Box of Plutonium Dust + Antimatter Cell → Antischrabidium Cell

§eTip§f: Antischrabidium is the gateway to dark matter and thus euphemium. Each dark matter capsule consumes 2 antischrabidium capsules, which in turn consume 4 antimatter capsules. Plan your particle accelerator runs carefully!
